title: The Vivre Card Points to Zou
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on the vivre card points to zou within the Weevil, the Barto Club, and the Road to Zou storyline.
scene: The Straw Hats rely on Bartolomeo's chaotic crew while the wider world introduces Weevil and pushes the voyage toward Zou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Imma gonna make him pay!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's gonna wish he was never born!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Foolish child, harboring a grudge isn't profitable at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't even gain 18 from all that non- sense!!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: Money, money, money!! That should be your priority! You need to to claim your inheritance!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: MMMMMM~?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: Sometimein' the matter Momma??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DOFLA- MINGO'S BEEN REMOVED FROM POWER...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's him again!!! GARP's GRANDSON!!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: At the pirate summit war, there are rumors that Marco and the others were protecting him...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: Which means he might be able to lead us to Marco!! Should we go beat it out of him?

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Bleeeaaargh.. Blogargggh.. Oeeerggghhh~

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fog is so thick... there's absolutely no visibility...

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: What the hell?! How can you guys call your- selves Pirates getting seasick from something like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: gum... gum... if we just chew some gum, it'll help the nausea... that's what Grammy used to say...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So that's why this boat was covered in gum?!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Boss!!! I've spotted something off the ship at 2'0clo- Bleeaaa Argggh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some thing, you say? What is- IirreeeeEA AARGHA~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: off deep in the thick fog...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps it's a mountain... or a monster... or- Oreeea AAARGH...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell kind of a monster would anyone ever mistake for a Mounta- Anywaaseaa Argggh*!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it appears as though it's been moving ever so slowly for a while now www.eaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaragh~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: .Our

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just fucking drunk is a- aquurrer eaaarghh~

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A moving mountain?! Let's go check it out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: MpfGH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't have time for this!! Right now, escaping this fog maze as fast as we can is our top priority!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we hit a reef, we'll be capsized!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hold it right there, God...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: "God" you say ^-?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aw, Shucks ...you're making me, the "200,000,000 man" blush~

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We've completed our Admiral-Class Reconmissions haven't we?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Look.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The Vivre card is pointing that way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WhooAA! It really is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: then your Nakama must be over there!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard there's an island that wards away any would-be visitors with thick fog and ocean currents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wind's blowing us away from it too!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Take down the sails, ready the oars!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!! BLEAA ARGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I didn't hear you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...usop... you're look- ing rather pale...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Perhaps some gum?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I've just realized the reality of our situa- lion...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: This is it?? the island "Zou"?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Geehh?! that doesn't look right at all?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: CRAAAP!! We've gotta haul ass outta here!! Turn the ship around!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: No, we're fine where we are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Traffy... you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: This is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: An actual elephant?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: gyaya AAAAA AA-!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Eeeee ehhhh ..!!!?!?!?!?!?!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: ...yes... [Zou] is the name of a land that rests on the back of a giant elephant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Geeeeee EH...?!! It's an actual living thing?!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's constantly moving ...an illusory island that doesn't exist in any one fixed place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Since, technically, it's not actually "land"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: No "Log pose" can reach it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is also my first time ever coming here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If we're heading towards its back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Then it's highly possible....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That "Black leg's" group got here before us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That eat elephant was putting distance between us, but it looks as though we've finally caught up to it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Correct... prepare to disemabrik.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would you mind sharing some of your provisions?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the fuck would we give anything to your sorry ass?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, would you mind giving some to Magiwara-ya?

summary: The Vivre Card Points to Zou: The Straw Hats struggle aboard Bartolomeo's ship while Edward Weevil and Miss Bakkin enter the story, and the crew follows the Vivre Card toward Zou.
